title: [FIRRTL] Module with instance sharing the same name creates a bad NLA

features.name: NLA with module symbol in instance path
features.description: Code should include an NLA (Non-Linear Analysis) annotation where the namepath contains a module symbol reference instead of only inner sym references, triggering an error about instance path only allowing inner sym references
features.snippet:
circuit Test : %[[{"class":"fake","target":"~Test|Test/Test:Example"}]]
  module Example :
  module Test :
    inst Test of Example

features.name: instance name matches parent module name
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the instance name is the same as the parent module's name, which can cause NLA path resolution issues
features.snippet:
module Test :
  inst Test of Example
